## Description

<!-- Summarise the changes in this PR and why they are needed. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update only

## Documentation

> **New features and API additions require documentation updates.**
> Failing to update the docs is the most common reason PRs are asked to make further changes.

Check all that apply:

- [ ] `README.md` — feature bullet list, table of contents, relevant section(s), and Registry API reference table updated
- [ ] `docs/wiki/Home.md` — new wiki page added to the table (if a new page was created)
- [ ] Relevant `docs/wiki/*.md` page(s) updated (e.g. `Loading-Configuration.md`, `Registry-API.md`, `Singleton-and-DI.md`)
- [ ] New `docs/wiki/<Feature>.md` page created for significant new features
- [ ] No documentation changes needed (explain why below)

<!-- If no documentation changes are needed, explain here: -->

## Tests

- [ ] New tests added that cover the change
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`dotnet test tests/Dapplo.Ini.Tests/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the existing style conventions (see existing files for reference)
- [ ] XML doc-comments added/updated on all new public API members
- [ ] Breaking changes listed in the description above
